mapper.select: select id ,email ,password ,name ,phone ,zipcode ,address1 ,address2 ,profile_image as profileImage ,role ,created_at ,updated_at ,account_locked as accountLocked ,locked_until as lockedUntil ,social_id as socialId ,social_type as socialType from member where email = #{email}

select id ,email ,password ,name ,phone ,zipcode ,address1 ,address2 ,profile_image as profileImage ,role ,created_at ,updated_at ,account_locked as accountLocked ,locked_until as lockedUntil ,social_id as socialId ,social_type as socialType from member
and email like concat('%', #{email}, '%')
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and role = #{role}
order by id desc

select count(*) from member
and email like concat('%', #{email}, '%')
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and role = #{role}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, address1 = #{address1}, address2 = #{address2}, profile_image = #{profileImage} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE member SET account_locked = false, locked_until = null where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id ,email ,password ,name ,phone ,zipcode ,address1 ,address2 ,profile_image as profileImage ,role ,created_at ,updated_at ,account_locked as accountLocked ,locked_until as lockedUntil ,social_id as socialId ,social_type as socialType FROM member WHERE social_type = #{socialType} AND social_id = #{socialId}

SELECT id ,email ,password ,name ,phone ,zipcode ,address1 ,address2 ,profile_image as profileImage ,role ,created_at ,updated_at ,account_locked as accountLocked ,locked_until as lockedUntil ,social_id as socialId ,social_type as socialType FROM member WHERE social_id = #{socialId}

SELECT * FROM member WHERE role IN
#{role}
